description: Get ready to take relaxed style to the next level with these genesis shoes from skechers. These slip on dress casual loafers are great for casual outings and look fabulous when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool laidback look.Upper Smooth leather upper with soft suede overlays for comfort and protection Fabric overlays on the toe counter and around collar White stitch detailing Embossed brand logo below collar on the back Rawhide accents on the back panel Plain venetian front Elasticated inserts on the sides for eady insertion and removal of the feet Soft fabric shoe lining Midsole Cushioned insole for step-in comfort Shock absorbing midsole for greater cushioing of the feet Outsole Wrap-under leather and suede midfoot panel Split design rubber outsole TPR lugs for greater traction Flexible traction outsole for greater flexibility of the feet Shoe careUse a dry brush to dust off the dirtUse a branded leather polish
